series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Department of Health Order from April 14, 2020 records
series_metadata.series_description: Any record received or created pursuant to the Ohio Department of Health''s Order issued on April 14, 2020. Such records include, but is not limited to, the name and address of those persons having tested positive for COVID-19. Such records are deemed protected health information as defined in R.C. 3701.17(A)(2)(a) pursuant to the order.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value
